figures.caption: Fig. 5. Illustration of the learned initial hidden state. The left column shows the ground-truth first frame. The right column shows the reconstruction result of the learnable initial hidden state (ℎ𝑔𝑙𝑜𝑏𝑎𝑙0 ) . Note that no supervision is applied directly on the learning of (ℎ𝑔𝑙𝑜𝑏𝑎𝑙0 ) . The information learned in (ℎ𝑔𝑙𝑜𝑏𝑎𝑙0 ) can be treated as an anchor frame that retains the main structure of a video and is used for predicting the following frames in the moving area. It also validates the effectiveness of the proposed method in learning the features of video frames within the hidden state of the RNN structure.

Fig. 2. Illustration of the spatial and temporal regular and irregular information in a video. The top shows the comparison of the reconstruction results using neural network only (without grid) and with grid (under the same number of parameters in total) on the UVG Beauty video. The residual map is obtained by subtracting the two results. The bottom is the reconstruction results on a spliced video that n frames of the Beauty are inserted between the 2N frames of a blooming lily video. The residual map in the top illustrates the spatial irregular information, mainly on the hair which is hard to be represented and not structured among video frames. The bottom results using the spliced video clearly show the temporal irregular information, which is difficult to be represented by a neural network but easily represented by a grid.
TABLE III Compression result comparison of the proposed method against different methods on UVG dataset, in terms of BD-rate.
Fig. 6. R-D curve comparison on UVG dataset.
Fig. 7. Example video reconstruction results on UVG and DAVIS. (Top) Jockey. (Bottom) Black swan.

Fig. 3. Left: Framework Overview. The proposed Coupled WarpRNN based multi-scale motion representation and compensation module is used to learn the regular and structured temporal information and the following NeRVBlocks are used to spatially reconstruct the frame. It can work independently without grid or any input based on its recurrent architecture. The Mixed Residual Grid is used to learn the remaining irregular information and added to the coupled WarpRNN for network reuse. Right: Structure of the proposed Coupled WarpRNN based multi-scale motion representation and compensation module.
Fig. 4. Illustration of the WarpRNN module, with a learned warping function.
